productDisplayName: Chhota Bheem Kids Girl I Love to Play Green Tshirt
description: Composition Green top made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with elasticated hems, round neck, and graphic and pop-up print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print It's all fun and frolick in this green top from Green Gold's chhota bheem collection. The elasticated sleeve hems and the happy faces of Chutki and her friends fills this top with pure joy. Crafted from pure and environmentally safe cotton, this top offers exemplary comfort. Team it with denim trousers, shorts or skirts.
